name: plexus-agent-config-monorepo
description: Plexus Agent Config: local dashboard for syncing Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, and Qwen Code rules, MCP servers, and skills.

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build -w plexus-agent-config-web && npm run build:cli
scripts.dev: npm run build:core && npm run dev -w plexus-agent-config-web -- -p 7777
scripts.link: npm run build && cd packages/cli && npm link
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run test:core && npm run build
scripts.release:patch: npm run verify && npm run bump:patch && node scripts/release-commit.mjs
